rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear rationales for each step.
rationale.RX.1: The recommendations are structural and verifiable against the artifact as given, with no uncertainty to disclose.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or scope issues.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced in the reorganization suggestions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
